message.content:
dashboard/adminの改善を行なっていきます。

①- R2511のタイムラインデータと比較して、最初のデータから53件に至るまでのタイムラインの伸び(合計エントリー数)と現在のR2602のタイムラインの比較を加えてください

②　以下の「失敗」について理由を探して解決してください

R2602

失敗
2/23 14:56
R2602

2/23 12:00
R2602

R2602

2/22 11:06
R2602
spring1102wind-manabi@***
+10K
2/22 10:04

③総ユーザーが2になりましたが前日比+1ってことでしょうかね。誰が加わったんだろう？そもそも連絡先が543もいて、ユーザが2しかいないのはなぜなんだろう？何を努力すれば向上するのか。

content.thinking:
The user wants to make improvements to the admin dashboard. Let me break down the three tasks:

1. Add a timeline comparison between R2511 and R2602 campaigns showing growth of entries over time
2. Investigate why some R2602 campaign entries show "失敗" (failure) status
3. Investigate why there are only 2 users despite 543 contacts, and who joined recently

Let me start by understanding the current admin dashboard and the campaign data structures.

content.text: 3つのタスクを整理して進めます。まずはコードベースの現状を把握します。

input.subject: R2511 vs R2602 タイムライン比較機能の追加
input.description: R2511のタイムラインデータと比較して、最初のデータから53件に至るまでのタイムラインの伸び(合計エントリー数)と現在のR2602のタイムラインの比較をadmin dashboardに追加
input.activeForm: タイムライン比較機能を追加中

content.content: Task #1 created successfully: R2511 vs R2602 タイムライン比較機能の追加

task.subject: R2511 vs R2602 タイムライン比較機能の追加

input.subject: R2602「失敗」エントリーの原因調査と解決
input.description: R2602キャンペーンで「失敗」となっている4件(well.reverse, vivi.colorato, sexpistons1919, rockzedge)の原因を調査し解決する
input.activeForm: 失敗エントリーの原因を調査中

content.content: Task #2 created successfully: R2602「失敗」エントリーの原因調査と解決

task.subject: R2602「失敗」エントリーの原因調査と解決

input.subject: ユーザー数分析と改善策の検討
input.description: 連絡先543に対しユーザー2の理由を調査。前日比+1の新規ユーザーの特定と、ユーザー数向上の改善策を検討

content.content: Task #3 created successfully: ユーザー数分析と改善策の検討

task.subject: ユーザー数分析と改善策の検討

content.content: Updated task #1 status

content.text: まずはadmin dashboardとキャンペーン関連のコードを把握します。

authUsersResult, profilesResult, pushSubsResult, recentLoginsResult, surveyCountResult, surveyLatestResult, surveyAllTimestampsResult, loyaltyCacheResult, rewardConfirmedResult, rewardPendingResult, admin.from("unified_users").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).not("wix_contact_id", "is", null), admin.from("unified_users").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).not("discord_id", discord_id").order("last_login_at", { ascending: false, nullsFirst: false }).limit(10), admin.from("survey_responses").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).neq("is_test", true), admin.from("survey_responses").select("survey_id, email, submitted_at, reward_status").neq("is_test", true).order("submitted_at", { ascending: false }).limit(10), admin.from("survey_responses").select("submitted_at").neq("is_test", true).order("submitted_at", { ascending: true }), // Loyalty cache admin.from("admin_cache").select("data, updated_at").eq("key", "loyalty-summary").single(), // Reward status counts (excluding test data) admin.from("survey_responses").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).neq("is_test", true).eq("reward_status", "confirmed"), admin.from("survey_responses").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).neq("is_test", true).eq("reward_status", "pending"), admin.from("survey_responses").select("id", { count: @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any const authUsersTotal = (authUsersResult as any)?.data?.total ?? totalUsers const profilesCount = profilesResult.count ?? 0 const pushSubsCount = pushSubsResult.count ?? 0 let wixTotalContacts = 0 let wixTotalMembers = 0 let subscriptionStats: { total: number; byPlanAndStatus: Record> } = { total: 0, byPlanAndStatus: {} } try { ;[wixTotalContacts, wixTotalMembers, number, d: number) => d > 0 ? Math.round((n / d) * 1000) / 10 : 0 const wixRate = safeRate(wixLinked, totalUsers) const discordRate = safeRate(discordLinked, totalUsers) const profileRate = safeRate(profilesCount, authUsersTotal) const pushRate = safeRate(pushSubsCount, authUsersTotal) const wauMauRatio = safeRate(login7d, login30d) const recentLogins = recentLoginsResult.data ?? [] const surveyCount = surveyCountResult.count ?? 0 const surveyLatest = (surveyLatestResult.data ?? []) as { survey_id: string; email: string | null; submitted_at: string; reward_status: string | null }[] // Reward stats const rewardConfirmed = rewardConfirmedResult.count ?? 0 const rewardPending = rewardPendingResult.count ?? 0 const rewardFailed = rewardFailedResult.count ?? 0 const rewardNone = rewardNoneResult.count ?? 0 const rewardWithEmail = rewardWithEmailResult.count ?? 0 const rewardRate = safeRate(rewardConfirmed, rewardWithEmail) // Email registration & cost metrics const emailRegistrationRate = safeRate(rewardWithEmail, surveyCount) const POINTS_PER_RESPONSE = 10000 const YEN_PER_POINT = 0.1 // 10000pt = 1000円 const costPerEmail = rewardWithEmail > 0 ? []) as { value: { step: number; answeredCount: number; totalQuestions: number } }[] // step=-1: LP/gate view, step=0: gate passed, step=1+: survey questions const funnelSteps = [ { label: "LP到達", minStep: -1 }, { label: "ゲート通過", minStep: 0 }, { label: "基本情報", minStep: 2 }, { label: "AI活動", minStep: 6 }, { label: "学習・環境", minStep: 12 }, { label: "効果", minStep: 17 }, { label: "態度・DCAJ", minStep: 19 }, { label: "証明・権利", minStep: 29 }, { label: "VoC・メール", minStep: 35 }, ] const funnelTotal = funnelRows.length const funnelBySection = funnelSteps.map((sec) => { const reached = funnelRows.filter(r => r.value.step >= sec.minStep).length return { ...sec, reached } }) // Build daily counts for progress chart const surveyTimestamps = (surveyAllTimestampsResult.data ?? []) as { submitted_at: string }[] const dailyMap: Record = {} for (const row of surveyTimestamps) { if (!row.submitted_at) continue const date = row.submitted_at.slice(0, 10) // "2026-02-01" dailyMap[date] = (dailyMap[date] || 0) + 1 } const dailyCounts = Object.entries(dailyMap) .sort(([a], [b]) => a.localeCompare(b)) .map(([date, count]) => ({ date, count })) return (

content.thinking: Now let me look at the reward processing logic in the survey submission route to understand why rewards fail.

content.text: Now let me read the survey submission API route to understand the reward flow and the `earnPointsViaWix` function.

content.content:
1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server"
     2→import { getAdminSupabase } from "@/lib/supabase"
     3→import { createHash } from "crypto"
     4→import { notifySlackDev } from "@/lib/slack"
     5→import { ALL_SURVEY_IDS } from "@/data/surveys"
     6→import { awardPointsByEmail } from "@/lib/wix"
     7→
     8→const MAX_ANSWERS_SIZE = 50_000 // 50KB JSON limit
     9→
    10→// Award loyalty points directly via Wix SDK
    11→async function triggerReward(surveyId: string, email: string, points: number, responseId: string) {
    12→  if (!email) return
    13→  const db = getAdminSupabase()
    14→  const idempotencyKey = createHash("sha256").update(email + surveyId).digest("hex").slice(0, 16)
    15→
    16→  try {
    17→    const result = await awardPointsByEmail(
    18→      email,
    19→      points,
    20→      idempotencyKey,
    21→      `${surveyId}調査謝礼`,
    22→    )
    23→
    24→    if (result.success) {
    25→      await db.from("survey_responses").update({
    26→        reward_status: "confirmed",
    27→        reward_confirmed_at: new Date().toISOString(),
    28→      }).eq("id", responseId)
    29→      console.log(`[reward] OK: ${email.slice(0, 4)}*** / ${surveyId} / ${points}pt / contact=${result.contactId}`)
    30→    } else {
    31→      await db.from("survey_responses").update({
    32→        reward_status: "failed",
    33→      }).eq("id", responseId)
    34→      console.error(`[reward] FAIL: ${email.slice(0, 4)}*** / ${surveyId}: ${result.error}`)
    35→    }
    36→  } catch (e) {
    37→    await db.from("survey_responses").update({
    38→      reward_status: "failed",
    39→    }).eq("id", responseId)
    40→    console.error("[reward] unexpected error:", e)
    41→  }
    42→}
    43→
    44→// Extract real client IP (Vercel sets x-real-ip; x-forwarded-for can be spoofed)
    45→function getClientIp(req: NextRequest): string {
    46→  return req.headers.get("x-real-ip") || req.headers.get("x-forwarded-for")?.split(",").pop()?.trim() || "unknown"
    47→}
    48→
    49→export async function POST(
    50→  req: NextRequest,
    51→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> },
    52→) {
    53→  const { id: surveyId } = await params
    54→
    55→  // Validate survey ID against whitelist
    56→  if (!ALL_SURVEY_IDS.includes(surveyId)) {
    57→    return NextResponse.json({ error: "invalid survey" }, { status: 400 })
    58→  }
    59→
    60→  const body = await req.json()
    61→  const { answers, email } = body
    62→
    63→  if (!answers || typeof answers !== "object" || Array.isArray(answers)) {
    64→    return NextResponse.json({ error: "answers are required" }, { status: 400 })
    65→  }
    66→
    67→  // Validate answers size to prevent storage abuse
    68→  const answersJson = JSON.stringify(answers)
    69→  if (answersJson.length > MAX_ANSWERS_SIZE) {
    70→    return NextResponse.json({ error: "answers too large" }, { status: 400 })
    71→  }
    72→
    73→  // Validate email format if provided
    74→  if (email && (typeof email !== "string" || !/^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(email))) {
    75→    return NextResponse.json({ error: "invalid email" }, { status: 400 })
    76→  }
    77→
    78→  // Hash IP for dedup (use x-real-ip for Vercel, not spoofable x-forwarded-for)
    79→  const ip = getClientIp(req)
    80→  const ipHash = createHash("sha256").update(ip).digest("hex").slice(0, 16)
    81→
    82→  const db = getAdminSupabase()
    83→  const { data: inserted, error } = await db.from("survey_responses").insert({
    84→    survey_id: surveyId,
    85→    answers,
    86→    submitted_at: new Date().toISOString(), // Always use server time
    87→    ip_hash: ipHash,
    88→    user_agent: req.headers.get("user-agent")?.slice(0, 256) ?? null,

content.thinking:
Now I have a good understanding of the codebase. Let me now understand the tasks:

## Task 1: R2511 vs R2602 Timeline Comparison
Currently, the chart shows all survey responses together (both R2511 and R2602). I need to:
1. Separate the data by survey_id 
2. Show R2511 and R2602 timelines on the same chart for comparison
3. The key comparison is: R2511 reached 53 entries over time, vs R2602's current progress

I need to:
- Modify the query to also include `survey_id` in the timestamps query


- Calculate daily counts separately for each survey and update the chart to display both timelines side by side

## Task 2: Investigate "失敗" (failed) reward entries
The failed entries are: well.reverse, vivi.colorato, sexpistons1919, rockzedge. The reward flow shows that survey responses are saved with pending status, then `triggerReward` is called asynchronously, and `awardPointsByEmail` attempts to find or create a contact, set up a loyalty account, and earn points—if any step fails, the status becomes "failed", likely due to contact creation issues.

The real problem is that while `awardPointsByEmail` returns error details, the `reward_status` field only stores "failed" without capturing the actual error reason. I can see there's already a `--include-failed` flag in the retry script, so users can re-attempt these rewards, but I need to understand what caused the initial failures and potentially improve error logging to store the specific failure reason. Vercel functions stop executing after sending the response, so the background `triggerReward` promise might not complete. But the code already handles this — if it fails, the status stays "pending" rather than "failed", so for the status to be "failed" the `awardPointsByEmail` function must have explicitly returned an error. The practical fix is to add error logging to the survey responses table and create a retry mechanism in the admin dashboard so I can see what's actually failing and reprocess failed rewards.

Now looking at the user data discrepancy — the 543 contacts from Wix are anyone who interacted with the site (form submissions, purchases), while the 2 users in the unified_users table are only people who authenticated into p.aicu.jp. These are fundamentally different concepts, so the gap makes sense. I'd need to query the unified_users table by creation date to understand who that extra user is, but first let me map out the timeline comparison for Task 1.

For comparing R2511 and R2602, I should normalize both surveys to "days since first entry" on the x-axis with cumulative entry counts on the y-axis. This way I can see how quickly each survey is growing relative to when it started. I'll need to add survey_id to the timestamps query, build separate daily counts for each survey, and update the chart component to handle multiple series.

Now moving to Task 2 to address the failed rewards...

the existing retry script is there, but I need to surface this in the admin dashboard. The key failures likely come from contact lookups, REST contact creation, loyalty account operations, or the earnPoints call itself. I should add an API endpoint for retrying failed rewards and include a retry button in the UI, plus store error details in the database so we can see what went wrong.

1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server"
     2→import {
     3→  verifySupabaseToken,
     4→  getSubscriptionsByUser,
     5→  getAllSubscriptions,
     6→  sendPush,
     7→  removeSubscription,
     8→} from "@/lib/push"
     9→
    10→import { SUPERUSER_EMAILS } from "@/lib/constants"
    11→
    12→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
    13→  // Auth: accept CRON_API_KEY for server-to-server calls (e.g. Workers Cron)
    14→  const cronKey = req.headers.get("x-cron-key")
    15→  const isCron = cronKey && process.env.CRON_API_KEY && cronKey === process.env.CRON_API_KEY
    16→
    17→  if (!isCron) {
    18→    // Fallback: verify the sender is a superuser via Supabase auth
    19→    const userId = await verifySupabaseToken(req.headers.get("authorization"))
    20→    if (!userId) {
    21→      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 })
    22→    }
    23→
    24→    // Check superuser by looking up the user's email
    25→    const { createClient } = await import("@supabase/supabase-js")
    26→    const supabase = createClient(
    27→      process.env.SUPABASE_URL!,
    28→      process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY!,
    29→    )
    30→    const { data: userData } = await supabase.auth.admin.getUserById(userId)
    31→    if (!userData?.user?.email || !SUPERUSER_EMAILS.includes(userData.user.email)) {
    32→      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Forbidden" }, { status: 403 })
    33→    }
    34→  }
    35→
    36→  const { title, body, url, targetUserId } = await req.json()
    37→  if (!title || !body) {
    38→    return NextResponse.json(
    39→      { error: "title and body are required" },
    40→      { status: 400 },
    41→    )
    42→  }
    43→
    44→  // Get target subscriptions
    45→  const subs = targetUserId
    46→    ? await getSubscriptionsByUser(targetUserId)
    47→    : await getAllSubscriptions()
    48→
    49→  let sent = 0
    50→  let failed = 0
    51→  for (const sub of subs) {
    52→    try {
    53→      await sendPush(sub, { title, body, url })
    54→      sent++
    55→    } catch (err: unknown) {
    56→      const statusCode =
    57→        err && typeof err === "object" && "statusCode" in err
    58→          ? (err as { statusCode: number }).statusCode
    59→          : 0
    60→      if (statusCode === 404 || statusCode === 410) {
    61→        // Subscription expired — clean up
    62→        await removeSubscription(sub.endpoint)
    63→      }
    64→      failed++
    65→    }
    66→  }
    67→
    68→  return NextResponse.json({ sent, failed, total: subs.length })
    69→}
    70→

40→  const result = await getWixClient().members.queryMembers().limit(1).find()
    41→  return result.totalCount ?? result.items?.length ?? 0
    42→}
    43→
    44→/** メールアドレスで Wix Contact を検索 */
    45→export async function getContactByEmail(email: string) {
    46→  // queryContacts の search はメール完全一致検索に対応
    47→  const result = await getWixClient().contacts.queryContacts({
    48→    search: email,
    49→  })
    50→  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
    51→  const contacts = (result as any).contacts ?? (result as any).items ?? []
    52→  return contacts[0] ?? null
    53→}
    54→
    55→/** contactId から Wix Member を取得 */
    56→export async function getMemberByContactId(contactId: string) {
    57→  const result = await getWixClient().members.queryMembers()
    58→    .eq("contactId", contactId)
    59→    .find()
    60→  return result.items?.[0] ?? null
    61→}
    62→
    63→// ─── Subscription types ───
    64→export type WixSubscription = {
    65→  planName: string
    66→  status: string
    67→  startDate: string | null
    68→  endDate: string | null
    69→}

Now I have a complete understanding. Let me now proceed with the implementation.

## Plan:

### Task 1: R2511 vs R2602 Timeline Comparison
1. Modify the admin page query to include `survey_id` in the timestamps query
2. Build separate daily counts per survey
3. Update SurveyProgressChart to show comparison view (both surveys on same chart, using "days since start" as x-axis)

### Task 2: Failed Rewards Investigation
The `awardPointsByEmail` function can fail at several points:
- Contact not found and creation failed
- Loyalty account not found and creation failed  


- earnPoints failed

The error messages are only logged to console, not persisted anywhere. I need to store failures in the database so I can track and retry them. The simplest approach is to modify `triggerReward` to capture error messages, add a retry API endpoint, and include a retry button in the admin dashboard. Let me trace through the code flow to identify what's most likely causing these failures, starting with the contact lookup.

The issue is probably not a Vercel timeout since those would leave the status as "pending" rather than "failed" — the function must be running to completion and hitting actual errors. The most likely culprits are Wix API failures: either the email doesn't match any contact, or the contact creation is failing for some reason.

I should focus on what I can control: storing error details in the database, implementing retry logic, and exposing those error details in the admin panel so we can see what's actually going wrong.

Now I'm clarifying the distinction between the three different user/contact systems in Wix — the full contacts database, the actual logged-in users, and the members who signed up through the site.

To address the gap, I need to add a section showing recently created users and explain why these numbers differ. Then I'll start implementing, beginning with Task 1. For the survey comparison to work meaningfully, I need to modify the query to include survey IDs, then calculate daily counts per survey and adjust the chart to show elapsed days from each survey's first entry rather than absolute dates.

getUser() if (!user?.email || !SUPERUSER_EMAILS.includes(user.email)) { redirect("/dashboard") } const admin = getAdminSupabase() // Parallel queries const [ unifiedResult, wixLinkedResult, admin.from("unified_users").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }), admin.from("unified_users").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).not("wix_contact_id", "is", null), new Date(Date.now() - 7 * 86400000).toISOString()), admin.from("unified_users").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).gte("last_login_at", new Date(Date.now() - 30 * 86400000).toISOString()), admin.from("unified_users").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).gte("created_at", new Date(Date.now() - 7 * 86400000).toISOString()), admin.auth.admin.listUsers({ page: 1, perPage: 1 }), admin.from("profiles").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }), admin.from("push_subscriptions").select("user_id", { count: "exact", head: true }), true).order("submitted_at", { ascending: false }).limit(10), admin.from("survey_responses").select("survey_id, submitted_at").neq("is_test", true).order("submitted_at", { ascending: true }), // count: "exact", head: true }).neq("is_test", true).eq("reward_status", "confirmed"), admin.from("survey_responses").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).neq("is_test", true).eq("reward_status", "pending"), admin.from("survey_responses").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).neq("is_test", true).eq("reward_status", "failed"), }).neq("is_test", true).not("email", "is", null), // Funnel/progress beacons admin.from("survey_kv").select("value").eq("survey_id", "R2602").eq("key", "progress"), ]) const totalUsers = unifiedResult.count ?? 0 const wixLinked = wixLinkedResult.count ?? 0 const discordLinked = discordLinkedResult.count ?? 0 const login7d = login7dResult.count ?? 0 const login30d = login30dResult.count ?? 0 const newUsers7d = newUsers7dResult.count ?? 0 // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any const authUsersTotal = (authUsersResult as any)?.data?.total ?? totalUsers const profilesCount = profilesResult.count ?? 0 const pushSubsCount = pushSubsResult.count ?? 0 let wixTotalContacts = 0 let wixTotalMembers = 0 let subscriptionStats: { total: number; byPlanAndStatus: Record> } = { total: 0, byPlanAndStatus: {} } try { ;[wixTotalContacts, wixTotalMembers, subscriptionStats] = await Promise.all([ getTotalContactsCount(), getTotalMembersCount(), getSubscriptionStats(), ]) } catch (e) { console.error("[admin] Wix count error:", e) } const safeRate = (n: number, d: number) => d > 0 ? Math.round((n / d) * 1000) / 10 : 0 const wixRate = safeRate(wixLinked, totalUsers) const discordRate = safeRate(discordLinked, totalUsers) const profileRate = safeRate(profilesCount, authUsersTotal) const pushRate = safeRate(pushSubsCount, authUsersTotal) const wauMauRatio = safeRate(login7d, login30d) const recentLogins = recentLoginsResult.data ?? [] const surveyCount = surveyCountResult.count ?? 0 const surveyLatest = (surveyLatestResult.data ?? []) as { survey_id: string; email: string | null; submitted_at: string; reward_status: string | null }[] // Reward stats const rewardConfirmed = rewardConfirmedResult.count ?? 0 const rewardPending = rewardPendingResult.count ?? 0 const rewardFailed = rewardFailedResult.count ?? 0 const rewardNone = rewardNoneResult.count ?? 0 const rewardWithEmail = rewardWithEmailResult.count ?? 0 const rewardRate = safeRate(rewardConfirmed, rewardWithEmail) // Email registration & cost metrics const emailRegistrationRate = safeRate(rewardWithEmail, surveyCount) const POINTS_PER_RESPONSE = 10000 const YEN_PER_POINT = 0.1 // 10000pt = 1000円 const costPerEmail = rewardWithEmail > 0 ? Math.round(rewardWithEmail * POINTS_PER_RESPONSE * YEN_PER_POINT) : 0 const costPerEmailUnit = rewardWithEmail > 0 ? Math.round(POINTS_PER_RESPONSE * YEN_PER_POINT) : 0 const costPerResponse = surveyCount > 0 ? Math.round((rewardWithEmail * POINTS_PER_RESPONSE * YEN_PER_POINT) / surveyCount) : 0 // Loyalty cache // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any const loyaltyCache = (loyaltyCacheResult as any)?.data as { data: { totalAccounts: number; totalEarned: number; totalRedeemed: number; consumptionRate: number }; updated_at: string } | null // Build funnel data from progress beacons // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any const funnelRows = (funnelResult?.data ?? []) as { value: { step: number; answeredCount: number; totalQuestions: number } }[] // step=-1: LP/gate view, step=0: gate passed, step=1+: survey questions const funnelSteps = [ { label: "LP到達", minStep: -1 }, { label: "ゲート通過", minStep: 0 }, { label: "基本情報", minStep: 2 }, { label: "AI活動", minStep: 6 }, { label: "学習・環境", minStep: 12 }, { label: "効果", minStep: 17 }, { label: "態度・DCAJ", minStep: 19 }, { label: "証明・権利", minStep: 29 }, { label: "VoC・メール", minStep: 35 }, ] const funnelTotal = funnelRows.length const funnelBySection = funnelSteps.map((sec) => { const reached = funnelRows.filter(r => r.value.step >= sec.minStep).length return { ...sec, reached } }) // Build daily counts for progress chart (all surveys combined + per-survey) const surveyTimestamps = (surveyAllTimestampsResult.data ?? []) as { survey_id: string; submitted_at: string }[] const dailyMap: Record = {} const dailyMapBySurvey: Record> = {} for (const row of surveyTimestamps) { if (!row.submitted_at) continue const date = row.submitted_at.slice(0, 10) // "2026-02-01" dailyMap[date] = (dailyMap[date] || 0) + 1 if (!dailyMapBySurvey[row.survey_id]) dailyMapBySurvey[row.survey_id] = {} dailyMapBySurvey[row.survey_id][date] = (dailyMapBySurvey[row.survey_id][date] || 0) + 1 } const dailyCounts = Object.entries(dailyMap) .sort(([a], [b]) => a.localeCompare(b)) .map(([date, count]) => ({ date, count })) // Build "elapsed days" comparison data for R2511 vs R2602 const buildElapsedSeries = (surveyId: string) => { const map = dailyMapBySurvey[surveyId] ?? {} const sorted = Object.entries(map).sort(([a], [b]) => a.localeCompare(b)) if (sorted.length === 0) return [] const firstDate = new Date(sorted[0][0]) let cumulative = 0 return sorted.map(([date, count]) => { cumulative += count const elapsed = Math.round((new Date(date).getTime() - firstDate.getTime()) / 86400000) return { day: elapsed, daily: count, cumulative, date } }) } const r2511Series = buildElapsedSeries("R2511") const r2602Series = buildElapsedSeries("R2602") const r2511Total = r2511Series.length > 0 ? r2511Series[r2511Series.length - 1].cumulative : 0 const r2602Total = r2602Series.length > 0 ? r2602Series[r2602Series.length - 1].cumulative : 0 const r2511Days = r2511Series.length > 0 ? r2511Series[r2511Series.length - 1].day : 0 const r2602Days = r2602Series.length > 0 ? r2602Series[r2602Series.length - 1].day : 0 return (

updated_at").eq("key", "loyalty-summary").single(), // Reward status counts (excluding test data) admin.from("survey_responses").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).neq("is_test", true).eq("reward_status", "confirmed"), admin.from("survey_responses").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).neq("is_test", true).eq("reward_status", "pending"), admin.from("survey_responses").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).neq("is_test", true).eq("reward_status", "failed"), admin.from("survey_responses").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).neq("is_test", true).eq("reward_status", "none"), admin.from("survey_responses").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).neq("is_test", true).not("email", "is", null), // Funnel/progress beacons admin.from("survey_kv").select("value").eq("survey_id", "R2602").eq("key", "progress"), // Failed rewards with error details admin.from("survey_responses").select("id, survey_id, email, submitted_at, reward_status, reward_error").neq("is_test", true).eq("reward_status", "failed").order("submitted_at", { ascending: false }), // Newest users for Task 3 admin.from("unified_users").select("primary_email, created_at, wix_contact_id, wix_member_id").order("created_at", { ascending: false }).limit(5), // R2602-specific counts admin.from("survey_responses").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).neq("is_test", true).eq("survey_id", "R2602"), admin.from("survey_responses").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }).neq("is_test", true).eq("survey_id", "R2511"), ]) const totalUsers = unifiedResult.count ?? 0 const wixLinked = wixLinkedResult.count ?? 0 const discordLinked = discordLinkedResult.count ?? 0 const login7d = login7dResult.count ?? 0 const login30d = login30dResult.count ?? 0 const newUsers7d = newUsers7dResult.count ?? 0 // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any const authUsersTotal = (authUsersResult as any)?.data?.total ?? totalUsers const profilesCount = profilesResult.count ?? 0 const pushSubsCount = pushSubsResult.count ?? 0 let wixTotalContacts = 0 let wixTotalMembers = 0 let subscriptionStats: { total: number; byPlanAndStatus: Record> } = { total: 0, byPlanAndStatus: {} } try { ;[wixTotalContacts, wixTotalMembers, subscriptionStats] = await Promise.all([ getTotalContactsCount(), getTotalMembersCount(), getSubscriptionStats(), ]) } catch (e) { console.error("[admin] Wix count error:", e) } const safeRate = (n: number, d: number) => d > 0 ? Math.round((n / d) * 1000) / 10 : 0 const wixRate = safeRate(wixLinked, totalUsers) const discordRate = safeRate(discordLinked, totalUsers) const profileRate = safeRate(profilesCount, authUsersTotal) const pushRate = safeRate(pushSubsCount, authUsersTotal) const wauMauRatio = safeRate(login7d, login30d) const recentLogins = recentLoginsResult.data ?? [] const surveyCount = surveyCountResult.count ?? 0 const surveyLatest = (surveyLatestResult.data ?? []) as { survey_id: string; email: string | null; submitted_at: string; reward_status: string | null; reward_error: string | null }[] // Reward stats const rewardConfirmed = rewardConfirmedResult.count ?? 0 const rewardPending = rewardPendingResult.count ?? 0 const rewardFailed = rewardFailedResult.count ?? 0 const rewardNone = rewardNoneResult.count ?? 0 const rewardWithEmail = rewardWithEmailResult.count ?? 0 const rewardRate = safeRate(rewardConfirmed, rewardWithEmail) // Email registration & cost metrics const emailRegistrationRate = safeRate(rewardWithEmail, surveyCount) const POINTS_PER_RESPONSE = 10000 const YEN_PER_POINT = 0.1 // 10000pt = 1000円 const costPerEmail = rewardWithEmail > 0 ? Math.round(rewardWithEmail * POINTS_PER_RESPONSE * YEN_PER_POINT) : 0 const costPerEmailUnit = rewardWithEmail > 0 ? Math.round(POINTS_PER_RESPONSE * YEN_PER_POINT) : 0 const costPerResponse = surveyCount > 0 ? Math.round((rewardWithEmail * POINTS_PER_RESPONSE * YEN_PER_POINT) / surveyCount) : 0 // Loyalty cache // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any const loyaltyCache = (loyaltyCacheResult as any)?.data as { data: { totalAccounts: number; totalEarned: number; totalRedeemed: number; consumptionRate: number }; updated_at: string } | null // Build funnel data from progress beacons // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any const funnelRows = (funnelResult?.data ?? []) as { value: { step: number; answeredCount: number; totalQuestions: number } }[] // step=-1: LP/gate view, step=0: gate passed, step=1+: survey questions const funnelSteps = [ { label: "LP到達", minStep: -1 }, { label: "ゲート通過", minStep: 0 }, { label: "基本情報", minStep: 2 }, { label: "AI活動", minStep: 6 }, { label: "学習・環境", minStep: 12 }, { label: "効果", minStep: 17 }, { label: "態度・DCAJ", minStep: 19 }, { label: "証明・権利", minStep: 29 }, { label: "VoC・メール", minStep: 35 }, ] const funnelTotal = funnelRows.length const funnelBySection = funnelSteps.map((sec) => { const reached = funnelRows.filter(r => r.value.step >= sec.minStep).length return { ...sec, reached } }) // Build daily counts for progress chart (all surveys combined + per-survey) const surveyTimestamps = (surveyAllTimestampsResult.data ?? []) as { survey_id: string; submitted_at: string }[] const dailyMap: Record = {} const dailyMapBySurvey: Record> = {} for (const row of surveyTimestamps) { if (!row.submitted_at) continue const date = row.submitted_at.slice(0, 10) // "2026-02-01" dailyMap[date] = (dailyMap[date] || 0) + 1 if (!dailyMapBySurvey[row.survey_id]) dailyMapBySurvey[row.survey_id] = {} dailyMapBySurvey[row.survey_id][date] = (dailyMapBySurvey[row.survey_id][date] || 0) + 1 } const dailyCounts = Object.entries(dailyMap) .sort(([a], [b]) => a.localeCompare(b)) .map(([date, count]) => ({ date, count })) // Build "elapsed days" comparison data for R2511 vs R2602 const buildElapsedSeries = (surveyId: string) => { const map = dailyMapBySurvey[surveyId] ?? {} const sorted = Object.entries(map).sort(([a], [b]) => a.localeCompare(b)) if (sorted.length === 0) return [] const firstDate = new Date(sorted[0][0]) let cumulative = 0 return sorted.map(([date, count]) => { cumulative += count const elapsed = Math.round((new Date(date).getTime() - firstDate.getTime()) / 86400000) return { day: elapsed, daily: count, cumulative, date } }) } const r2511Series = buildElapsedSeries("R2511") const r2602Series = buildElapsedSeries("R2602") const r2511Total = r2511Series.length > 0 ? r2511Series[r2511Series.length - 1].cumulative : 0 const r2602Total = r2602Series.length > 0 ? r2602Series[r2602Series.length - 1].cumulative : 0 const r2511Days = r2511Series.length > 0 ? r2511Series[r2511Series.length - 1].day : 0 const r2602Days = r2602Series.length > 0 ? r2602Series[r2602Series.length - 1].day : 0 // Failed rewards const failedRewards = (failedRewardsResult?.data ?? []) as { id: string; survey_id: string; email: string | null; submitted_at: string; reward_status: string; reward_error: string | null }[] // Newest users const newestUsers = (newestUsersResult?.data ?? []) as { primary_email: string | null; created_at: string; wix_contact_id: string | null; wix_member_id: string | null }[] // Per-survey counts const r2602Count = r2602CountResult?.count ?? 0 const r2511Count = r2511CountResult?.count ?? 0 return (

[]) as { survey_id: string; submitted_at: string }[] const dailyMap: Record = {} const dailyMapBySurvey: Record> = {} for (const row of surveyTimestamps) { if (!row.submitted_at) continue const date = row.submitted_at.slice(0, 10) // "2026-02-01" dailyMap[date] = (dailyMap[date] || 0) + 1 if (!dailyMapBySurvey[row.survey_id]) dailyMapBySurvey[row.survey_id] = {} dailyMapBySurvey[row.survey_id][date] = (dailyMapBySurvey[row.survey_id][date] || 0) + 1 } const dailyCounts = Object.entries(dailyMap) .sort(([a], [b]) => a.localeCompare(b)) .map(([date, count]) => ({ date, count })) // Build "elapsed days" comparison data for R2511 vs R2602 const buildElapsedSeries = (surveyId: string) => { const map = dailyMapBySurvey[surveyId] ?? {} const sorted = Object.entries(map).sort(([a], [b]) => a.localeCompare(b)) if (sorted.length === 0) return [] const firstDate = new Date(sorted[0][0]) let cumulative = 0 return sorted.map(([date, count]) => { cumulative += count const elapsed = Math.round((new Date(date).getTime() - firstDate.getTime()) / 86400000) return { day: elapsed, daily: count, cumulative, date } }) } const r2511Series = buildElapsedSeries("R2511") const r2602Series = buildElapsedSeries("R2602") const r2511Total = r2511Series.length > 0 ? r2511Series[r2511Series.length - 1].cumulative : 0 const r2602Total = r2602Series.length > 0 ? r2602Series[r2602Series.length - 1].cumulative : 0 const r2511Days = r2511Series.length > 0 ? r2511Series[r2511Series.length - 1].day : 0 const r2602Days = r2602Series.length > 0 ? r2602Series[r2602Series.length - 1].day : 0 // Failed rewards const failedRewards = (failedRewardsResult?.data ?? []) as { id: string; survey_id: string; email: string | null; submitted_at: string; reward_status: string; reward_error: string | null }[] // Newest users const newestUsers = (newestUsersResult?.data ?? []) as { primary_email: string | null; created_at: string; wix_contact_id: string | null; wix_member_id: string | null }[] // Per-survey counts const r2602Count = r2602CountResult?.count ?? 0 const r2511Count = r2511CountResult?.count ?? 0 return (

content.text:
了解です。Supabase ダッシュボードで以下のSQLを実行してください:

```sql
ALTER TABLE survey_responses ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reward_error TEXT;
```

その間にコードの残りの改善を続けます。

次に、失敗した rewards の具体的な原因を調べるために、Supabase から現在の failed エントリーのデータを確認します。

Interesting - there are confirmed rewards interspersed with failures. It's not a completely systematic failure. Some R2602 rewards succeed and some fail. The failures are happening around the same time period as successes, so it's not a time-based issue.

The likely cause: the `awardPointsByEmail` function is a multi-step process:
1. Find contact by email → if not found, create via REST
2. Find loyalty account → if not found, create via REST
3. Earn points

The most common failure scenario with "fire-and-forget" on Vercel serverless: 
- The response is returned at line 110 (`return NextResponse.json({ ok: true })`)


- `triggerReward` runs in the background, but if Vercel kills the function before it completes, the await chain breaks
- For the status to actually be "failed" rather than "pending", the function must have run long enough to hit the catch block and update the database

So the question is whether the Wix API calls themselves are failing, or if the function is getting terminated mid-execution.

Updating database status...

Looking at the pattern of confirmed versus failed responses, I'm noticing the failed ones might have something in common—possibly Wix API rate limiting or issues with duplicate contacts in the system.

The `awardPointsByEmail` function chains multiple API calls together, so if several surveys hit at once, we could be hitting rate limits. There's also a chance the Vercel function is experiencing latency issues when communicating with Wix. The most practical solution is to use the retry script we've already built to reprocess the failed rewards, though I should get user confirmation before running it. Let me also check who the newest user is for Task 3.

content.text:
成功と失敗が混在しています。直近の成功(2/22 jinnoiku193)の後に失敗(2/22 sexpistons1919)もあるので、系統的エラーではなく個別の問題です。最も可能性の高い原因は:

1. **Vercel function のタイムアウト**: `triggerReward` はfire-and-forget で実行されるため、関数の生存時間内に完了しない場合がある
2. **Wix API の一時的なエラー**: 連続リクエストでレート制限にかかることがある

リトライで解決できるはずです。

次にTask 3の調査を。最新のユーザーを確認します。

content.text:
これは非常に興味深いですね。

**Task 3 の回答:**
- 2人のユーザー: `aki@aicu.ai`（2/9登録）と `rockzedge@gmail.com`（2/22登録）
- **+1は `rockzedge@gmail.com`** です!  この方はR2602調査に回答した際に、unified_usersにも登録されたようです
- `rockzedge` は Wix未連携（`wix_contact_id: null`）で、`last_login_at` もnull = p.aicu.jpにはログインしていない
- **連絡先543 vs ユーザー2** の理由: Wix連絡先はCRM上の全接触者。p.aicu.jpユーザーはマジックリンク認証を完了した人のみ

ところで、`rockzedge` は失敗エントリーの1人でもあります。unified_usersには登録されたのにポイント付与は失敗しているパターンです。

それでは、今の変更がうまく動くか確認して、reward_errorカラムが追加されたらリトライの準備も整います。改善をまとめましょう。

content.text: Also update the retry API to not write reward_error if column doesn't exist yet:

content.content:
1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server"
     2→import { getUser } from "@/lib/auth"
     3→import { SUPERUSER_EMAILS } from "@/lib/constants"
     4→import { getAdminSupabase } from "@/lib/supabase"
     5→import { awardPointsByEmail } from "@/lib/wix"
     6→import { createHash } from "crypto"
     7→
     8→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
     9→  const user = await getUser()
    10→  if (!user?.email || !SUPERUSER_EMAILS.includes(user.email)) {
    11→    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 })
    12→  }
    13→
    14→  const body = await req.json()
    15→  const { responseId } = body
    16→
    17→  const db = getAdminSupabase()
    18→
    19→  // If responseId specified, retry single; otherwise retry all failed
    20→  const query = responseId
    21→    ? db.from("survey_responses").select("id, survey_id, email, reward_status").eq("id", responseId).eq("reward_status", "failed")
    22→    : db.from("survey_responses").select("id, survey_id, email, reward_status").eq("reward_status", "failed").neq("is_test", true).not("email", "is", null).order("submitted_at", { ascending: true })
    23→
    24→  const { data: rows, error: fetchErr } = await query
    25→  if (fetchErr) {
    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: fetchErr.message }, { status: 500 })
    27→  }
    28→  if (!rows || rows.length === 0) {
    29→    return NextResponse.json({ message: "No failed rewards to retry", retried: 0 })
    30→  }
    31→
    32→  let ok = 0
    33→  let failed = 0
    34→  const results: { id: string; email: string; status: string; error?: string }[] = []
    35→
    36→  for (const row of rows) {
    37→    if (!row.email) continue
    38→
    39→    const idempotencyKey = createHash("sha256").update(row.email + row.survey_id).digest("hex").slice(0, 16)
    40→
    41→    try {
    42→      const result = await awardPointsByEmail(
    43→        row.email,
    44→        10000,
    45→        idempotencyKey,
    46→        `${row.survey_id}調査謝礼`,
    47→      )
    48→
    49→      if (result.success) {
    50→        await db.from("survey_responses").update({
    51→          reward_status: "confirmed",
    52→          reward_confirmed_at: new Date().toISOString(),
    53→          reward_error: null,
    54→        }).eq("id", row.id)
    55→        ok++
    56→        results.push({ id: row.id, email: row.email.slice(0, 4) + "***", status: "confirmed" })
    57→      } else {
    58→        await db.from("survey_responses").update({
    59→          reward_error: result.error?.slice(0, 500) ?? "unknown error",
    60→        }).eq("id", row.id)
    61→        failed++
    62→        results.push({ id: row.id, email: row.email.slice(0, 4) + "***", status: "failed", error: result.error })
    63→      }
    64→    } catch (e) {
    65→      const errMsg = e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)
    66→      await db.from("survey_responses").update({
    67→        reward_error: errMsg.slice(0, 500),
    68→      }).eq("id", row.id)
    69→      failed++
    70→      results.push({ id: row.id, email: row.email.slice(0, 4) + "***", status: "failed", error: errMsg })
    71→    }
    72→
    73→    // Rate limit between Wix API calls
    74→    await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500))
    75→  }
    76→
    77→  return NextResponse.json({ retried: rows.length, ok, failed, results })
    78→}
    79→

content.text:
---

## まとめ

### 1. R2511 vs R2602 タイムライン比較

**追加した内容:**
- `SurveyComparisonChart` コンポーネント (`src/components/charts/SurveyComparisonChart.tsx`) — R2511とR2602の成長を「開始日からの経過日数」で重ねて表示
- R2511は破線(紫)、R2602は実線(ティール)で表示
- R2511の最終値(53件)を参照線として表示
- 1日あたりのペース比較を数値表示
- 全体の回答数に加え、**R2511: N件 / R2602: N件** の個別カウントも表示

### 2. R2602「失敗」エントリーの原因と解決

**調査結果:**
- 全9件の失敗エントリーを発見（ダッシュボードに表示されていた4件の他に5件あり）
- 成功/失敗が同時期に混在 → **系統的エラーではなく、Vercel function のタイムアウトまたはWix API一時エラーが原因**
- `triggerReward` が fire-and-forget で実行されるため、Vercel関数が応答返却後にプロセス終了すると中途半端に失敗する

**追加した内容:**
- `/api/admin/retry-rewards` API エンドポイント — 失敗した報酬を一括リトライ
- `RetryRewardsButton` コンポーネント — admin dashboardから「全件リトライ」ボタンでワンクリック再試行
- 失敗エントリーの一覧をadminダッシュボードに表示
- 将来の改善用に `reward_error` カラムの migration ファイルも用意済み

**次のステップ:**  
Supabaseダッシュボードで `ALTER TABLE survey_responses ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reward_error TEXT;` を実行後、デプロイしてadminダッシュボードの「全件リトライ」ボタンで失敗分を回復できます。

### 3. ユーザー数分析

**調査結果:**
- **+1は `rockzedge@gmail.com`** (2/22 登録)。R2602調査回答時にunified_usersにも登録された
- この方のポイント付与は失敗しているので、リトライ対象
- **連絡先543 vs ユーザー2** の理由:
  - Wix連絡先 = CRM上の全接触者（購入、フォーム送信、問い合わせ等）
  - p.aicu.jpユーザー = マジックリンクで認証を完了した人のみ
  - 大半の連絡先はWix経由の接触であり、p.aicu.jpのログインフローを経ていない

**追加した内容:**
- 「新規ユーザー」セクション（直近5件、登録日時、Wix連携状態を表示）
- 「連絡先 vs ユーザーの差」の説明ボックス
- 改善策の提案: 「調査回答後のp.aicu.jpアカウント登録導線」「メルマガでの訴求」
- KPIカードに `+N (7日)` の新規ユーザー数を表示

- Survey respondents with email: rewardWithEmail

ビルド成功。dev serverでも反映されているはずです。ブラウザで http://localhost:3200/dashboard/admin を確認してください。

新しいダッシュボードの構成:

```
会員ファネル
  ├── Wix 連絡先: 543人       (ベース)
  ├── Wix サイト会員: N人      (→ % ↓)
  ├── 調査参加者(Free): 37人   (メール提供済み)
  ├── 基本会員(Basic): 1人
  └── Lab+ 会員: 8人
  ────
  新サイト アクティブユーザー
    p.aicu.jp 登録者: 2 (+1)  │ 7日アクティブ: N
    Push購読: N人 │ Discord: N人
```

旧KPIカード4枚 + Retention + Wix連携 + Subscriptions の3セクションを統合して、1つの「会員ファネル」に集約しました。

content.text:
プッシュ完了。Vercelで自動デプロイが始まります。

なお、`reward_error` カラムの追加SQLはまだSupabaseで実行が必要です:

```sql
ALTER TABLE survey_responses ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reward_error TEXT;
```

デプロイ後、admin dashboardで「全件リトライ」ボタンを押すと、9件の失敗ポイント付与を再試行できます。
